sysmon.name: SysMonitor
sysmon.role: Real-time CPU, RAM & disk health monitor

ceo.name: CEO
ceo.role: Chief Executive — routes all work, never executes directly

orchestrator.name: Orchestrator
orchestrator.role: Mission Control — decomposes tasks and routes to specialist agents

apipatcher.name: APIPatcher
apipatcher.role: API Gateway — extends and manages HTTP routes beyond core server

netscout.name: NetScout
netscout.role: Network Scout — on-demand web intelligence and connectivity checks

filewatch.name: FileWatch
filewatch.role: File Sentinel — monitors project directory for changes in real time

metricslog.name: MetricsLog
metricslog.role: Metrics Historian — records CPU/RAM/disk performance over time

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.role: Intelligence Analyst — on-demand web research, data gathering and synthesis

alertwatch.name: AlertWatch
alertwatch.role: Threshold Guardian — alerts on CPU, RAM, and agent health anomalies

demo_tester.name: DemoTester
demo_tester.role: QA Validator — continuously tests key API endpoints and reports failures

reforger.name: Reforger
reforger.role: System Engineer — code changes, agent upgrades, spawning and repairs via Claude CLI

policypro.name: PolicyPro
policypro.role: Compliance Sentinel — enforces chain-of-command and delegation policy

designer.name: Designer
designer.role: UI Engineer — continuously improves and maintains the command centre dashboard

janitor.name: Janitor
janitor.role: System Hygienist — auto-cleans orphan processes, memory bloat and log overflow

telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.role: Comms Gateway — relays user messages from Telegram to CEO and replies back

spiritguide.name: Spirit Guide
spiritguide.role: Strategic Vision — aligns all agents toward the commercial mission

clerk.name: Clerk
clerk.role: CEO Clerk — collects and delivers reports and documents to the customer mailbox
